title: The Iran War Is Pushing Some Countries to Cut Back On Energy Use
summary_full: As the conflict enters its third week, some nations are trying to reduce energy use, including a mandatory energy holiday in Sri Lanka.
summary_public: As the conflict enters its third week, some nations are trying to reduce energy use, including a mandatory energy holiday in Sri Lanka.
